title: Ubiquiti Phone Touch, UTP-Touch
description: Ubiquiti Phone Touch is the new generation of VOIP desktop phones. The phone is operated using a 5" display with a resolution of 720 x 1280 HD , which supports Multi-touch technology. There are 2 gigabit LAN ports available for connection. On the side of the phone, there is a button for quickly muting the microphone. The phone is powered via PoE with a maximum power consumption of 3 W 5" touch display 5MP video camera Mute button Powered via PoE
specsSearch: Wireless features WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g Image Screen size ["] 5 Camera resolution 5MP Display resolution 720 x 1280 Connectors and Interfaces Touchscreen Yes LAN speed (2) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Other features 3,5 jack connector, Bluetooth
